summary: Create Company Action Plan Template Item
description: Creates a Company Action Plan Template Item

items.description: Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee (Compact)

created_at.description: Time the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was created

is_holding.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee is necessary to sign for a hold point

role.description: Role of the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee

updated_at.description: Time the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was updated

holding_type.description: Company Plan Template Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

plan_template_id.description: ID the Company Action Plan Template Item belongs to

position.description: Position among other Company Action Plan Template Items within a Company Action Plan Template Section

plan_template_section_id.description: ID of the Company Action Plan Template Section the Company Action Plan Template Item belongs to

due_at.description: Due date for the template item

plan_template_section_id.description: ID of the Company Action Plan Template Section it belongs to

holding_type.description: Specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the Action Plan Section or the Action Plan
